nasb.text: The watchmen who make the rounds in the city found me, And I said, ‘Have you seen him whom my soul loves?’

esv.text: The watchmen found me as they went about in the city. “Have you seen him whom my soul loves?”

cnv.text: 城中的守衛巡邏的時候，找著我； 我就問他們：“你們有沒有看見我心所愛的？”

ccb.text: 遇上了城中巡逻的守卫， 我就问他们：“你们看到我心爱的人了吗？”
